questions.text: Read the function below. What bug would make this fail for an empty list?
questions.imageAlt: A small diagram showing values flowing into an average function

questions.text: The chart shows the order that three async tasks completed. Explain why the printed output might not match the order the tasks were started.
No image on this one. What does this SQL query return, and what edge case should you watch for?
questions.code:
SELECT department, COUNT(*) AS total
FROM employees
WHERE active = true
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY total DESC;
